display.purpose: Dashboard and result-screen page titles. Fixed rem, not fluid.

body.purpose: Enunciados and explanations. Cap prose at 65-75ch.

shadows.name: ambient-rest
shadows.purpose: Soft layered resting lift on cards and panels.

shadows.name: raised
shadows.purpose: Cards/interactive surfaces lift a touch on hover.

motion.name: ease-question
motion.purpose: 280ms swipe for question transitions in the player.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: 150-250ms default for state transitions (hover, focus, card lift).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action: start exam, submit answer, advance.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font-family: Manrope, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #ffffff; background: #0891b2; border: none; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 22px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease-in-out, box-shadow 0.15s ease-in-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0e7490; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0891b2; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #155e75; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action sharing the primary's shape and rhythm.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { font-family: Manrope, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #334155; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 22px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease-in-out, border-color 0.15s ease-in-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f1f5f9; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0891b2; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Resting surface defined by border; lifts on hover.
components.html:
Cardiologia

142 questões · 78% de acerto
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(15,23,42,0.08), 0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,0.06); transition: background 0.2s ease-in-out, box-shadow 0.2s ease-in-out; } .ds-card:hover { background: #f1f5f9; box-shadow: 0 6px 16px -4px rgba(15,23,42,0.12); } .ds-card:active { box-shadow: none; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 4px; font-family: Manrope, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.125rem; color: #0f172a; } .ds-card-body { margin: 0; font-family: Manrope, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: #334155; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Outlined field; border shifts to Momentum Cyan on focus.
components.css: .ds-input { font-family: Manrope, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: #0f172a; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 14px; transition: border-color 0.15s ease-in-out, box-shadow 0.15s ease-in-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #64748b; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #0891b2; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(8,145,178,0.15); }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Pill filter; selected state uses the cyan tint, never green/red.
components.css: .ds-chip { font-family: Manrope, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #334155; background: #f1f5f9; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 4px 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease-in-out; } .ds-chip:hover { background: #e2e8f0; } .ds-chip--selected { color: #0e7490; background: #ecfeff; border-color: #0891b2; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Link
components.description: Icon + label row; active uses Momentum Cyan on cyan tint.
components.html: PainelProvas
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; width: 220px; } .ds-nav-link { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; font-family: Manrope, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #334155; text-decoration: none; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 8px; transition: background 0.15s ease-in-out, color 0.15s ease-in-out; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: #f1f5f9; } .ds-nav-link--active { color: #0891b2; background: #ecfeff; }

components.name: Answer Alternative (feedback)
components.description: Quiz alternative row; locks to emerald (correct) or red (incorrect) after answering.
components.html:
AAdministrar o medicamento conforme prescrição.
BSuspender a medicação sem comunicar a equipe.
components.css: .ds-alt { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px; font-family: Manrope, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: #334155; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 14px; margin-bottom: 8px; transition: background 0.15s ease-in-out, border-color 0.15s ease-in-out; } .ds-alt:hover { background: #f1f5f9; } .ds-alt-key { flex: none; width: 24px; height: 24px; display: grid; place-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.8125rem; color: #475569; background: #f1f5f9; } .ds-alt--correct { color: #047857; background: #ecfdf5; border-color: #10b981; } .ds-alt--correct .ds-alt-key { color: #ecfdf5; background: #10b981; } .ds-alt--wrong { color: #b91c1c; background: #fef2f2; border-color: #ef4444; } .ds-alt--wrong .ds-alt-key { color: #fef2f2; background: #ef4444; }

narrative.overview: This is a serious athlete's gym for the mind, not a playground. The interface exists so a working nurse can show up, do the reps (questions, simulados, review), and watch their numbers climb. Energy comes from visible progress and a clean, purposeful space, never from decoration. The app is the coach: it pushes, it tracks, it celebrates real milestones. It is never the mascot. The language is one confident accent (Momentum Cyan) over a disciplined slate-and-white field, set in one typeface (Manrope). Surfaces are calm and tactile: soft layered shadows give a gentle app-like depth, with hairline slate borders for definition.
keyCharacteristics: One accent (Momentum Cyan), one typeface (Manrope), a slate neutral spine.
Soft, layered shadows for calm app-like depth; hairline slate borders define.
Progress is always legible; that visibility is the motivation engine.
Built for the marathon: high legibility, low fatigue, long sessions.
Energetic, never cute. A coach for an adult professional under pressure.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Momentum Cyan is the only brand color on a screen, used for action, current state, and progress, on roughly <=10% of the surface. Emerald and red are semantic, earned only by answer feedback and metric deltas.

rules.name: The Feedback-Only Color Rule
rules.body: Green and red never decorate. They mean correct and incorrect (or up/down on a metric). A green button or a red divider used for flavor is forbidden.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Manrope carries every role. No display serif, no second sans. Reach for weight and size before another family.

rules.name: The Soft Layering Rule
rules.body: Depth comes from low-opacity slate shadows (never pure black, never a hard 2014-era drop shadow). If a shadow looks like a dark box under the card, the opacity is too high and the blur too small. Keep it ambient. A hairline slate-300 border rides under it for definition.

dos: Do keep Momentum Cyan (#0891b2) as the single accent for action, active state, and progress, on <=10% of any screen.
Do reserve emerald and red strictly for answer feedback and metric deltas.
Do give surfaces soft layered ambient shadows (low-opacity slate) with a 1px slate-300 hairline border under them; deepen on hover, flatten on press.
Do set everything in Manrope, using weight (400->800) and the fixed rem scale for hierarchy.
Do make progress visible on every relevant screen; that visibility is the motivation, in place of cartoon rewards.
Do keep prefers-reduced-motion alternatives for every animation.
Do hold body text to >=4.5:1 contrast; slate-500 is the lightest allowed for real text, slate-700 for long reading.
donts: Don't ship childish gamification: no Duolingo-style mascots, confetti on every tap, or cartoon badges.
Don't build the cluttered cram-site look: dense text walls, ad-stuffed panels, zero breathing room.
Don't fall into the generic SaaS dashboard: identical KPI card grids or the giant hero-metric template.
Don't use green or red as decoration; they mean correct/incorrect only.
Don't introduce a second typeface, a second accent hue, or clamp-scaled hero type.
Don't use hard, dark drop shadows (the 2014 look); keep them low-opacity slate and ambient. And never nest a card inside a card.
Don't use border-left/border-right >1px as a colored accent stripe.
